# SecureTech AV Designs

> India's #1 AV System Integrator — End-to-end Audio Visual Solutions

## About

SecureTech AV Designs Private Limited is India's leading AV (Audio Visual) system integrator and solutions provider. We design, install, and maintain cutting-edge AV systems for corporate offices, educational institutions, auditoriums, healthcare facilities, government buildings, retail spaces, residential luxury homes, stadiums, cinemas, clubs, and judiciary courts across India.

Founded in 2020 and headquartered in Delhi NCR, India, SecureTech AV has served 150+ clients and delivered 200+ projects with a perfect 5-star Google rating from 29 reviews.

## Services

SecureTech AV Designs provides the following professional services:

### 1. Architectural Acoustics
Sound isolation, acoustic treatment, noise control, room acoustics optimization for auditoriums, recording studios, conference halls, and commercial spaces. We use advanced acoustic modeling to deliver optimal sound environments.

### 2. Audio Visual Systems
Professional audio systems, video walls, projection systems, LED displays, video conferencing solutions, digital signage, PA systems, and AV control rooms. We integrate world-class brands including Bose, JBL, Sennheiser, Sony, LG, Cisco, Christie, and Kramer.

### 3. Lighting Architecture
Architectural lighting design, stage lighting, LED installations, smart lighting control systems for venues, corporate offices, auditoriums, and buildings.

### 4. Information Technology (IT Infrastructure)
IT infrastructure design, network architecture, structured cabling, server room design, and end-to-end technology integration for organizations.

### 5. Project Management
Complete AV project lifecycle management — from initial consultation and design through procurement, installation, commissioning, and handover.

### 6. Post-Project Services
Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC), 24/7 technical support, system upgrades, equipment replacement, and ongoing AV system optimization.

## Sectors We Serve

- **Corporate**: Boardrooms, conference rooms, video conferencing, digital signage, town halls, training rooms
- **Education**: Smart classrooms, lecture halls, interactive displays, distance learning, campus-wide AV
- **Healthcare**: Hospital communication systems, surgical displays, patient entertainment, telemedicine AV
- **Government / Public Sector**: Command centres, council chambers, public address systems, government office AV
- **Retail**: In-store digital signage, interactive kiosks, background music systems, immersive brand experiences
- **Residential**: Home theatres, multi-room audio, smart home AV, luxury automation systems
- **Auditoriums & Theatres**: Complete auditorium AV — sound, lighting, video, acoustics, control systems
- **Stadiums**: Large-scale PA systems, LED scoreboards, video walls, crowd management AV
- **Cinemas**: Immersive cinema sound, projection systems, Dolby integration
- **Clubs & Nightlife**: DJ systems, club sound, lighting rigs, AV control
- **Judiciary**: Court AV systems, evidence display, recording systems, PA

## Brand Partners

SecureTech AV works with the world's leading AV technology brands:
Bose Professional, JBL Professional, Sennheiser, Sony, LG, Cisco, Christie, Kramer, QNC, British Acoustics, and more.

## Why Choose SecureTech AV

- 150+ satisfied clients across India
- 200+ successfully delivered projects
- 5-star Google rating (29 reviews)
- End-to-end AV solutions — design, installation, support
- Expertise across corporate, education, healthcare, government, and residential sectors
- Partnerships with world-leading AV brands
- Dedicated post-project support and AMC services
